name: Quality
description: Tracks a rolling per-line, per-product defect rate from inspections and raises an alert when it breaches the configured threshold.
author: FactoryOS

api.description: A tenant's current per-line defect rate, each flagged against the threshold and whether it is under quarantine; an optional filter narrows to only breaching lines.
A tenant's quality rollup: the threshold, tracked line count and how many currently breach.
Places a line under quarantine and announces QualityLineQuarantined on a real transition. Requires the 'quality.quarantine' permission.
